jobs.name: arXiv LLM Fine-Tuning Papers Weekly
jobs.prompt:
Search arXiv for the top 5 most recent LLM fine-tuning papers. Use the arxiv skill to query by keyword: search for recent papers on "LLM fine-tuning" OR "large language model fine-tuning". Get results sorted by submission date (newest first). 

Select the top 5 most relevant ones to fine-tuning techniques (LoRA, QLoRA, PEFT, instruction tuning, RLHF, supervised fine-tuning, etc.), filter out unrelated papers.

Then deliver the result with this format for each paper:
- **Title**
  Published: YYYY-MM-DD
  Abstract: one-sentence summary of what the paper is about
  arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/XXXX.XXXXX

Start with a header: "Top 5 LLM Fine-Tuning Papers on arXiv This Week"

Send to user at chat ID 1508030749 via telegram.

jobs.name: Hermes VPS Weekly Backup
jobs.prompt: Weekly backup of Hermes VPS to GitHub. Runs the backup script which git adds, commits, and pushes to origin/main.
